title: Mohamed M. Ketebمحمد مهدي كاتب
text:
Github
  
  
    
     LinkedIn
  






  


PhD candidate under Prof. Pierre E. Jacob @ Department of Information Systems, Data Analytics and Operations – ESSEC Business School.
Education: I graduated from ENSAE Paris - Polytechnic Institute of Paris and completed a master’s degree in probability and statistics at the Institut des Mathématiques d’Orsay, Université Paris-Saclay. During my master’s thesis, I worked with Pierre E. Jacob on unbiased Markov Chain Monte Carlo with couplings, and previously I was an intern with Francesca Romana Crucinio on particle swarm optimization.
Research interests: I work at the intersection of probability and statistics, with a main focus on methodological and theoretical aspects of Monte Carlo methods. Currently, I focus on unbiased estimation of log normalizing constant via path sampling and Markov chain coupling.
contact me at mohamed [dot] keteb [at] essec.edu
Office Nautile Bulding, Campus of Cergy

title: Photography
text:
As a wizard and scholar of Middle-earth, I have been studying the magic of the natural world for centuries. Through my self-portraits, I aim to capture the essence of my own being and reflect on my own journey through time. Each photograph is a reflection of my own experiences and emotions. Through my photography, I hope to offer a glimpse into my life as a scholar and adventurer, and inspire others to reflect on their own journeys through the world.
